title: +112% this weekbut the goal was never to “hit big”
author: Amanda-Medina
selftext:
What changed for me wasn’t strategy, it was consistency

I stopped forcing trades and started focusing on:waiting for clean setupskeeping risk smallletting winners develop instead of cutting early

The curve looks smooth now,but most of the time it was just patience and doing nothing

Honestly made it way easier to stay disciplinedNot a signals thing, just real discussion and accountability

LatelyI’ve been sharing weekly watchlists, setups, and risk ideas with a small groupno signals, no paid stuff, just discussion

If this kind of approach resonates with you,feel free to comment or DMalways open to exchange ideas
